content_rights.rationale: NASA/SVS publishes the main horizontal item under its baseline; licensed music and individually credited visuals remain excluded from transcript-only processing.

transcript_rights.rationale: NASA/SVS publishes the main non-reel VTT as an official same-group caption asset. Private preservation is provisional under the cited terms; legal/policy review remains required.

content_completeness.rationale: The official source publishes the complete horizontal-rendition transcript; the vertical reel is excluded and the 0.412-second tail remains recorded.

retention_and_derivation.rationale: Caption-only private evaluation; the horizontal and vertical versions remain separated and media are link-only.

attribution.credit: NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center and item-specific visual contributors
third_party_caveats: Universal Production Music and individually credited visual material are not retained or redistributed.

version_equivalence.evidence: The main horizontal group co-locates Pandora_ToS_Best.mp4, the main non-REEL sidecars/transcript, and exact official YouTube link; the vertical reel is excluded.
